PyPGx.EfficientDV.allele_frequency_ratio.description: Minimal ratio between the allele frequency in tumor and normal for non h indels and snvs, for vcf filtering

PyPGx.EfficientDV.annotation_intervals.description: List of bed files for VCF annotation

PyPGx.EfficientDV.call_variants_threads.description: Number of decompression threads for call_variants

PyPGx.EfficientDV.call_variants_uncompr_.description: Memory buffer allocated for each uncompression thread in calll_variants

PyPGx.EfficientDV.dbg_min_base_quality.description: Minimal base quality for local assembly of haplotypes

PyPGx.EfficientDV.ensemble_reference_row.description: Number of reference rows for ensemble inference

PyPGx.EfficientDV.ensemble_size.description: Size of the ensemble for inference

PyPGx.EfficientDV.germline_vcf.description: Germline vcf file in order to generate haplotypes that incorporate germline variants

PyPGx.EfficientDV.gq_bins.description: GQ bins to use instead of a fixed resolution (overrides gq_resolution)

PyPGx.EfficientDV.h_indel_allele_frequen.description: Minimal ratio between the allele frequency in tumor and normal for h-indels for vcf filtering

PyPGx.EfficientDV.h_indel_vaf_to_pass.description: Minimal variant allele frequency for h-indels to not filter out by allele frequency ratio

PyPGx.EfficientDV.hard_qual_filter.description: Any variant with QUAL < hard_qual_filter will be discarded from the VCF file

PyPGx.EfficientDV.input_flow_order.description: Flow order. If not provided, it will be extracted from the CRAM header

PyPGx.EfficientDV.intervals_string.description: Regions for variant calling, in the format chrom:start-end. Multiple regions are separated by semi-colon. hese regions. Takes precedence over target_intervals. If both are not provided then entire genome is used.

PyPGx.EfficientDV.log_make_examples_prog.description: Cause make_examples to output detailed progress information (for debugging)

PyPGx.EfficientDV.max_reads_per_partitio.description: Maximal number of reads that are stored in memory when analyzing an active region

PyPGx.EfficientDV.min_base_quality.description: Minimal base quality for candidate generation

PyPGx.EfficientDV.min_fraction_hmer_inde.description: Minimal fraction of reads, that support an h-mer indel, required to generate a candidate variant

PyPGx.EfficientDV.min_fraction_non_hmer_.description: Minimal fraction of reads, that support a non-h-mer indel, required to generate a candidate variant

PyPGx.EfficientDV.min_fraction_snps.description: Minimal fraction of reads, that support a snp, required to  generate a candidate variant

PyPGx.EfficientDV.min_hmer_plus_one_cand.description: Minimal hmer length, above which more 1-bp insertion candidates are generated, provided they also meet allele frequency conditions

PyPGx.EfficientDV.min_read_count_hmer_in.description: Minimal number of reads, that support an h-mer indel, required to generate a candidate variant

PyPGx.EfficientDV.min_read_count_non_hme.description: Minimal number of reads, that support a non-h-mer indel, required to generate a candidate variant

PyPGx.EfficientDV.min_read_count_snps.description: Minimal number of reads, that support a snp, required to  generate a candidate variant

PyPGx.EfficientDV.model_serialized.description: TensorRT model for calling variants, serialized for a specific platform (it is regenerated if not provided)

PyPGx.EfficientDV.no_address_override.description: Whether to disable assigning external IP addresses to VMs (relevant for Google)

PyPGx.EfficientDV.optimization_level.description: Optimization level for TensorRT engine in call_variants

PyPGx.EfficientDV.output_realignment.description: Output haplotypes and re-aligned reads to a bam file. Default: false.

PyPGx.EfficientDV.p_error.description: Basecalling error for reference confidence model in gvcf

PyPGx.EfficientDV.pangenome_haplotypes_i.description: Optional pangenome haplotypes cram index file

PyPGx.EfficientDV.prioritize_alt_support.description: Generate an image with all available alt-supporting reads, and only then add non-supporting reads

PyPGx.EfficientDV.scatter_intervals_brea.description: The length of the intervals for parallelization are multiples of scatter_intervals_break. This is also the maximal length of the intervals.

PyPGx.EfficientDV.show_bg_fields.description: Show background fields in the output vcf. Default: false. Mostly relevant for somatic calling.

PyPGx.EfficientDV.shuffle_all_samples.description: Whether to shuffle all samples during inference

PyPGx.EfficientDV.strand_bias_normalizat.description: Thresholds for strand bias normalization. The first value is the lowest strand bias (further from 1:1) to normalize, the second value is the highest strand bias (closest to 1:1) to normalize

PyPGx.EfficientDV.strong_call_threshold.description: Threshold for boundary call. If ensemble_size > 0 boundary calls will be re-called using ensemble inference

PyPGx.EfficientDV.ug_make_examples_cpus_.description: CPU number override for make_examples step

PyPGx.base_file_name.description: Prefix for name of all output files

PyPGx.exome_intervals.description: A bed file with exome intervals. Used at the post-processing step to annotate the vcf and modify the FILTER of variants in the exome.

PyPGx.gene_symbols.description: List of gene symbols to analyze

PyPGx.input_vcf_file.description: Input VCF file with variants. If not provided, Efficient DV will be run

PyPGx.model_onnx.description: TensorRT model for calling variants (onnx format)

PyPGx.ref_dbsnp.description: DbSNP vcf for the annotation of known variants

PyPGx.ref_files_for_tarball.description: List of references for CreateReferenceCache task.

PyPGx.references.description: Reference files: fasta, dict and fai
